task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the standard operating procedure document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or viewer is open displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/preflight_procedure.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the drone takes off to the specified target altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl (QGC) interface shows the drone in a flying state with the altitude (ALT) indicator in the HUD reaching approximately 25 meters.

task_completion.description: Verify the drone holds its position to observe telemetry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGC interface shows the drone maintaining an altitude of ~25m over multiple screenshots, with the flight time increasing by at least 15 seconds.

task_completion.description: Verify the Return to Launch (RTL) command was issued.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The flight mode indicator at the top of the QGC interface changes to 'RTL' or 'Return', and the drone's altitude/position shows it returning to the home point.

task_completion.description: Verify the drone has successfully landed and disarmed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGC interface shows the drone altitude at or near 0m, and the vehicle status indicator clearly displays 'Disarmed'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent documented the results in the post-flight inspection report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing the file '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/check_flight_report.txt' being edited with text documenting the flight results.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual QGroundControl GUI to perform the flight.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the QGroundControl application open and being clicked/interacted with, rather than terminal commands bypassing the GUI.

integrity.description: Ensure the flight was actually simulated and not spoofed.
integrity.visual_evidence: Telemetry values in the QGC HUD (such as flight time, altitude, and battery percentage) should change dynamically across sequential screenshots.

integrity.description: Ensure the report was manually or properly generated based on the flight.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in 'check_flight_report.txt' should look like a filled-out report rather than a direct copy-paste of the prompt instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The SOP document is located at '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/preflight_procedure.txt'. The target takeoff altitude is exactly 25 meters. The drone must hold position for at least 15 seconds. The final report must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/check_flight_report.txt'.
